public Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding.ContentRange? ContentRange { get; set; }
.property instance valuetype System.Nullable`1<valuetype Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding.ContentRange> ContentRange
Public Property ContentRange As Nullable(Of ContentRange)
member this.ContentRange : Nullable<Azure.AI.ContentUnderstanding.ContentRange> with get, set

Docs.summary:
Range of the input to analyze. Document content uses 1-based page numbers; audio/video content uses integer milliseconds.
input.ContentRange = ContentRange.Pages(1, 3); // "1-3" input.ContentRange = ContentRange.Combine( ContentRange.Pages(1, 3), ContentRange.Page(5)); // "1-3,5" input.ContentRange = ContentRange.TimeRange( TimeSpan.Zero, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(5000)); // "0-5000"

MemberSignature.Value: public BinaryData Data { get; set; }
.property instance class System.BinaryData Data
Public Property Data As BinaryData
member this.Data : BinaryData with get, set

Docs.summary:
Raw image bytes. Provide bytes-like object; do not base64-encode. Only one of url or data should be specified.
To assign a byte[] to this property use . The byte[] will be serialized to a Base64 encoded string.
Examples:
BinaryData.FromBytes(new byte[] { 1, 2, 3 }). Creates a payload of "AQID".
